reviews.review_description:
The game is amazing and I got this a few days ago and I started training and right when the bot was at 1 hp or so the knock back was to high and it didn’t let me attack it when I was right in front of the bot until it healed to 100 hp and you can’t turn down knock back so please make it a thing for training unless it’s intentional that’s fine but please other make it a setting for training or just turn the knock back down a bit

Five stars.

This is not a game, its an exploit to steal money from people. You can't even launch into a match without paying. Absolutely disgusting.
Would've been nice to know this beforehand. Thanks for souring your only chance to ever get my money.

developer_response.body: Hello, You can definitely play a match without paying. There are 3 free hero classes out of the 5 that you can select and play with. Make sure to select a hero class and then you can click play to play a free match.

reviews.review_description:
I hate those game I thought I could punch bye
 me swing my arm I hate it
Awesome but I can't work out if the players are all bots. Other than that it's quality has some polishing up to do but otherwise solid.

its free for one class the archer you cant change your char or class unless you pay 10 dollers with tax about 11 or 12. interesting fighter game could at least try it out theres ALOT of customization for creating a character which i liked.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We have updated the app to allow for more classes that you can play for free :). We are still in early access and do appreciate your feedback to make the experience better.

reviews.review_title: Played for free stayed for me
reviews.review_description:
Reviewed because I just lit a guy up with dive kicks and Shoryukens until I decided to play guard tag 10/10 fighter huge combo list for whenever your ready to start touching the big boy buttons. Archer is the only free playable class however after a few matches it is clear you have no immediate downside to just playing archer. You can customize your character to look however you want, mine has a green 2ft long faux and outfit that makes him look like a side character from Yu-Gu-Oh, the spinoff one that takes place at small head hogwarts. 
somersaultheadbutt is my in game name add me or challenge me in the Discord I'm taking any available L's until someone starts crying

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We updated the app and provided more playable classes for free :). Have fun!!

reviews.review_title: I love this game I just wish
reviews.review_description: I just wish you was able to talk to the other players that you're competing against this game is totally amazing I will recommend it to all my friends and family we are fans fighting games and this is by far what we've been looking for just what we've been looking for. Please make more just like it mechanics in this game is amazing the physics are awesome the resolution is very impressive I just wish it wasn't so difficult to connect with other players with colds and we could just jump in and play and talk to each other while having fighting matches but overall the game is one of the best fighting games on quest

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review :). We plan to continue updating the game and look ways to improve playing with friends.
